ops.text: PRE-REGISTRATION E30.5 (training-variance decomposition). Hypothesis: run-to-run training variance σ_train of the standard watcher recipe is material relative to the paired instrument (the one historical rerun pair implies σ_train ≈ 0.010 AUC ≈ 70% of the paired MDE 0.0143), so single-run FT-vs-FT deltas may be seed noise; measure it properly BEFORE E30.2a is interpreted. Method: 5 retrains of the IDENTICAL standard watcher recipe (the weekly lane's: qwen3-8b LoRA via athome Tinker, same data snapshot — pin ~/.cc-steer/dataset/watcher/train.parquet as of dispatch by copying it into the harness, near_dup_representatives + carve_val exactly as build_train_plan does, max_tokens 4096 with the 36ca84a5 eval-row filter), varying ONLY the training seed (1..5). Each artifact scored eval-what-you-serve: MLX 4-bit conversion + the standard score-watcher path on the frozen n=628 frame, in the experiment's own dirs (NEVER the served adapter dir; local GPU fine — Sunday 07-26 blackout window not in play if run now). Registered quantities, computed once: the 5 test AUCs; σ_train = sample SD with χ² 95% CI (df=4); the updated FT-vs-FT actionability floor |Δ| ≥ 2.8016·√(SE_row² + 2σ²_train/m) evaluated at m=1 and m=5; comparison of σ_train to the historical ≈0.010 estimate. Spend: 5 × ~$8 Tinker ≈ $40 core + $16 contingency (scoring/conversion reruns) = $56 HARD CAP under SpendGuard reservations. Harness ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E30/e30_5/ with own venv (cc-steer from git+file@main; athome from the sibling tree — never the shared athome venv). VERIFY: independent recompute of σ_train + χ² CI from the 5 persisted per-row prob parquets, re-derivation of one AUC from raw probs, audit that all 5 runs used identical config except seed (diff the 5 persisted TrainSpecs), SpendGuard ledger ≤ cap. Check-back triggers: any run's config drifts, Tinker capacity/queue makes 5 runs infeasible, scoring path can't reproduce the incumbent's 0.9317 sanity number on the 628 before the arms score.
